CVE-2016-10345.title: In Phusion Passenger before 5.1.0, a known /tmp filename was used ...
CVE-2016-10345.description: In Phusion Passenger before 5.1.0, a known /tmp filename was used during passenger-install-nginx-module execution, which could allow local attackers to gain the privileges of the passenger user.
